lede: A look at June 26 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Salvador Allende and Samir Nasri, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Julian Assange
events.desc: Julian Assange, founder of WikiLeaks, returns to Australia after pleading guilty to one charge of espionage in a Saipan court and subsequently being released by the United States Department of Justice.

events.title: Supreme Court of the United States
events.desc: The U.S. Supreme Court rules, 5–4, that same-sex couples have a constitutional right to marriage under the 14th Amendment to the United States Constitution.

events.title: J. K. Rowling
events.desc: J. K. Rowling publishes the first of her Harry Potter novel series, Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone in United Kingdom.

events.title: Elvis Presley
events.desc: Elvis Presley holds what will prove to be his final concert at Market Square Arena in Indianapolis, Indiana.

events.title: San Marino
events.desc: World War II: San Marino, a neutral state, is mistakenly bombed by the RAF based on faulty information, leading to 35 civilian deaths.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: The American Expeditionary Forces begin to arrive in France. They will first enter combat in the Battle of Hamel on July 4.

events.title: 1906 French Grand Prix
events.desc: The first Grand Prix motor race is held at Le Mans.

events.title: Bangui
events.desc: Bangui is founded by Albert Dolisie and Alfred Uzac in what was then the upper reaches of the French Congo.

events.title: Henri Moissan
events.desc: Henri Moissan isolated elemental Fluorine for the first time.

events.title: June Days uprising
events.desc: End of the June Days Uprising in Paris.

births.name: Salvador Allende
births.line: Chilean physician and politician, 29th President of Chile

deaths.text: Ludwik Skumin Tyszkiewicz, Polish poet and politician
Francisco Pizarro, Spanish explorer and politician, Governor of New Castile (born c. 1471)

observances.text: Day of the Armed Forces of Azerbaijan
Christian feast day: Isabel Florence Hapgood (Episcopal Church)
Christian feast day: José María Robles Hurtado (one of Saints of the Cristero War)
